name: Watched folder → Markdown → Summary
description: Every 5 minutes, scan a folder for documents, convert each to clean Markdown, and write a summary next to the original file as <name>.summary.md.
prerequisites: The folder to watch exists (default c:\temp\sampleDocs).
An agent profile with file_system, markdown_convert, and the model you want to use is configured.

defaultJob.name: Watched folder summariser
defaultJob.prompt: List every file in c:\temp\sampleDocs whose name does NOT end with .summary.md. For each one: 1) call markdown_convert on it (or read+pass the content if it is already markdown); 2) write a concise 5-bullet summary to <original>.summary.md using file_system.write; 3) skip files that already have a .summary.md sibling. Report at the end how many files were processed and how many were skipped.
